title: cyperus mutisii var. asper
intro: Cyperus mutisii var. asper, also known as the sharp-flowered umbrella sedge, is a type of plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae) that is native to South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cyperus mutisii var. asper include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat colds, coughs, and other respiratory infections.
